themes: Geopolitical Stability and Crude Oil Prices
Foreign Institutional Investor (FII) Flows and Rupee Volatility

stocksToWatch.name: HDFC Bank Ltd.
stocksToWatch.reason: Banking sector significantly outperformed in the previous week, driven by robust domestic economic data and DII support. Technicals for Bank Nifty show strong support and upward momentum.

stocksToWatch.name: Reliance Industries Ltd.
stocksToWatch.reason: Highly sensitive to crude oil prices and geopolitical developments. Declining crude oil prices due to de-escalation hopes are a positive, but geopolitical uncertainty remains a watch item.

stocksToWatch.name: Infosys Ltd.
stocksToWatch.reason: IT sector faced pressure in the prior week. Outlook will be heavily influenced by global cues, particularly from the US Federal Reserve's FOMC meeting and any shifts in global growth forecasts.

stocksToWatch.name: Larsen & Toubro Ltd.
stocksToWatch.reason: Benefits from strong domestic economic growth and government focus on infrastructure. Continued resilience in the Indian economy provides a favorable environment for capital goods and infrastructure companies.

stocksToWatch.name: Hindustan Unilever Ltd.
stocksToWatch.reason: FMCG sector is sensitive to rural demand and inflation. Concerns over below-average monsoon forecast and potential for higher energy/food prices could impact consumer spending.

recommendation.reasoning: The banking sector showed exceptional resilience and growth in the past week, with Bank Nifty surging over 4%. Strong domestic economic indicators and continued DII support for financial institutions, coupled with a positive technical outlook for the sector, make HDFC Bank a strong candidate for an upside move.
